title: Arrival Setup Survival Kit
description: First-day cards and checklist for airport arrival, hotel check-in, payment testing, and transport.

tools.name: Hotel address help
tools.text_cn: 请帮我去这家酒店。这个是酒店地址。
tools.text_en: Please help me get to this hotel. This is the hotel address.

tools.name: I do not speak Chinese
tools.text_cn: 我不会说中文，请用翻译软件和我沟通。
tools.text_en: I do not speak Chinese. Please use a translation app to communicate with me.

tools.name: Safe taxi stop
tools.text_cn: 请在安全合法的地方停车，谢谢。
tools.text_en: Please stop somewhere safe and legal. Thank you.

checklist_steps: Turn on eSIM or roaming before leaving the airport
Make one small Alipay or WeChat Pay test payment
Save your hotel name and address in Chinese
Choose metro, official taxi, ride-hailing, or transfer
Charge your phone and power bank before sleeping
ai_prompt: Help me with my first 24 hours after arriving in China.

title: Food & Dining Survival Kit
description: Restaurant ordering, allergy cards, spice level, payment phrases, and food-delivery prep.

tools.name: Peanut allergy
tools.text_cn: 我对花生过敏，请不要放花生或花生酱。
tools.text_en: I am allergic to peanuts. Please do not add peanuts or peanut sauce.

tools.name: Less spicy
tools.text_en: Please make it mildly spicy and use less chili.

tools.name: Need the bill
tools.text_en: Hello, could I have the bill please?

checklist_steps: Prepare allergy or food restriction cards
Set up Alipay or WeChat Pay before ordering
Save one translation app for menus
Learn how to ask for mild spice
Keep your hotel address ready for food delivery
ai_prompt: Help me order food in China and explain dietary restrictions.
